title: Kimi K3 Released: Moonshot's 2.8T Open-Weight Model Is Live
excerpt: Moonshot AI launched Kimi K3 on July 16, 2026 — a 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weight model with a 1M-token context. Here's what shipped and what's next.
contentHtml:
What shipped

On July 16, 2026, Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, a Mixture-of-Experts model with a reported 2.8 trillion total parameters and a 1,000,000-token context window. It is available now through the Kimi app, Kimi Work, Kimi Code, and the Kimi API.

Why it matters

K3 is described as the world's first open model in the 3-trillion-parameter class. On the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index it scores about 57, placing fourth among 189 models, and it ranks first on arena.ai's Code WebDev leaderboard.

What's next

Moonshot plans to publish the full model weights by July 27, 2026 under a Modified MIT licence. We'll track the release, licence, and self-hosting reality in our open-weights guide.

Independent, non-affiliated coverage. Verify all figures against Moonshot's official channels.
